articles.content: Launching the Galaxy Z TriFold was sort of a redemption for Samsung. After several years of underwhelming upgrades, including the uninspiring Galaxy S26 Ultra, the company needed to demonstrate that … [+3466 chars]

articles.title: Sparkly Friends Plush Collection Is Now Available at Pokémon Center - Pokemon.com
articles.description: Pokémon Center’s Sparkly Friends plush collection is sure to add some shimmery charm to your home.
